operators.name: datadog-operator-certified-rhmp
operators.description: Datadog provides a modern monitoring and analytics platform. Gather metrics, logs and traces for full observability of your Kubernetes cluster with Datadog Operator.\n\n**WARNING**: Starting from version `1.21.0`, the Datadog Operator DatadogAgent controller only watches by default the namespace where it is installed. This means your `DatadogAgent` custom resource must be created in the same namespace as the Operator. This can be changed by removing the `DD_AGENT_WATCH_NAMESPACE` environment variable from the Datadog Operator deployment inside the ClusterServiceVersion YAML.

operators.name: datadog-operator-certified-rhmp

This means your `DatadogAgent` custom resource must be created in the same namespace as the Operator. This can be changed by removing the `DD_AGENT_WATCH_NAMESPACE` environment variable from the Datadog Operator deployment inside the ClusterServiceVersion YAML.
